title: Women’s Halloween Squash Social

content:
The Women’s Halloween Social Event was held on November 2nd, Saturday from 3pm to 7:30pm. 

Our second Women’s quarterly Squash Social Event was a huge success! We had 29 brave women donning their Halloween best, dressed as animals, superheroes, and in sexy clothes. The “Best Dresser” prize went to Caroline de Vries for her hand-made Queen dress. 

We had a full slate of singles and doubles matches, all the while enjoying drinks and appetizers courtside. The event ended with delicious Italian dinner and deserts. 

Thank you again to the volunteers, Caroline de Vries, Heather Looy, Heather Sanregret, Krystal Belanger, Sandra Gawad, and Aya Okamoto. 

Keep an eye out for the next Women’s social – hopefully sometime in early 2020!
